---
title: "Innovation"
description: "Business research and development — Canada and OECD peers"
---

Innovation turns research into new products, processes, and growth. A core measure
is how much businesses themselves invest in R&D — a signal of how research-intensive
a country's industries are. For the broader research base (total R&D and the
research workforce) see [Science](../science/index.qmd); for business investment
overall, see [Economy](../economics/index.qmd#business-investment).

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from pipeline.config import get_data_date
from pipeline.charts import peer_comparison_line, ranked_bar
```

## Business R&D (BERD, % of GDP)

Business Enterprise Expenditure on R&D — the portion of R&D performed by the private sector, and a standard gauge of business-led innovation.

```{python}
#| echo: false
berd_path = "data/science/oecd_berd.csv"
if os.path.exists(berd_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(berd_path)
    fig = peer_comparison_line(df, "year", "berd_pct_gdp",
        title="", yaxis_title="Business R&D (% of GDP)", show_average=True)
    fig.update_layout(annotations=[dict(
        text=f"Source: OECD MSTI | Data as of: {get_data_date(berd_path)}",
        xref="paper", yref="paper", x=0, y=-0.34,
        showarrow=False, font=dict(size=10, color="#999"))])
    fig.show(config={"displaylogo": False, "modeBarButtonsToRemove": ["lasso2d", "select2d"]})
else:
    print("Business R&D data not yet available. Run the data pipeline.")
```

## Latest business R&D: ranked

```{python}
#| echo: false
if os.path.exists(berd_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(berd_path)
    fig = ranked_bar(df, "berd_pct_gdp", "Business R&D (% of GDP)",
        f"Source: OECD MSTI | Data as of: {get_data_date(berd_path)}",
        min_countries=15, hover_template="%{y}: %{x:.2f}%<extra></extra>")
    fig.show(config={"displaylogo": False})
```

## Download data

- [Business R&D, BERD (CSV)](../data/science/oecd_berd.csv) — OECD MSTI
